title: Minimum Additions to Make Valid String
titleCn: 构造有效字符串的最少插入数

testcases.input: word = "b" Output: 2 Explanation: Insert the letter "a" right before "b", and the letter "c" right next to "b" to obtain the valid string "abc".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Insert the letter "a" right before "b", and the letter "c" right next to "b" to obtain the valid string "abc".

testcases.input: word = "aaa" Output: 6 Explanation: Insert letters "b" and "c" next to each "a" to obtain the valid string "abcabcabc".
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: Insert letters "b" and "c" next to each "a" to obtain the valid string "abcabcabc".

testcases.input: word = "abc" Output: 0 Explanation: word is already valid. No modifications are needed.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: word is already valid. No modifications are needed.
